emails.subject: Resume: Dipak Agarwallah Ph.D. econ.
emails.body: Resume: Dipak Agarwallah Ph.D. econ. Here is a resume forwarded to our group. Dipak has some industry experience, but does not seem to have programming skills. Any interest? --Stinson Forwarded by Stinson Gibner/HOU/ECT on 11/09/2000 10:01 AM Paulo Issler 11/07/2000 02:56 PM

emails.subject: Re: Resume: Dipak Agarwallah Ph.D. econ.
emails.body: Re: Resume: Dipak Agarwallah Ph.D. econ. Stinson, I think I read one of his papers. Mechanical application of one technique to power prices, no useful insights. We can still invite him. Vince Stinson Gibner 11/09/2000 10:06 AM
